title: Senior Full Stack ABAP/UI5 Developer
description: We are excited to announce an opportunity for a dedicated and experienced Senior Full Stack ABAP/UI5 Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will be engaged in a high-impact project based on SAP CRM, with ABAP backend and SAP UI5 frontend technologies. If you possess a combination of in-depth SAP development expertise and a passion for crafting robust solutions in a dynamic environment, we would love to welcome you on board. This is a fantastic chance to leverage your technical skills, collaborate with skilled professionals, and contribute to the advancement of our client’s critical systems. Responsibilities Develop and optimize custom build application using ABAP Objects, oData and SAP UI5 Implement and manage backend services with oData and CDS Views Enhance user interfaces using SAP UI5 Perform unit testing for ABAP and UI5 components Collaborate with teams to integrate solutions and support system maintenance Requirements 5+ years in SAP development with ABAP Objects and SAP UI5 expertise Strong experience in SAP CRM English level: Upper-Intermediate (B2) or higher We offer CONTINUOUS UPSKILLING, LEARNING & DEVELOPMENT Diversity of tasks and projects Assessment center for objective review of competency level Personal development plan Mentoring programs and leadership development Certification and professional development support Access to learning platforms including more than 2,500 internal courses and the LinkedIn Learning library with 20,000+ courses English courses taught by certified teachers CORPORATE BENEFITS Extra leave days Referral bonuses COMPENSATION PACKAGE Competitive compensation paid in USD Regular salary and performance reviews MEDICAL & HEALTHCARE Private health insurance Well-being events WORKING ENVIRONMENT Recreation areas and kitchens Tea, coffee, and snacks Well-being events Sports equipment and game consoles IT Equipment Microsoft's Software Assurance Home Use Program (HUP) EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential. Please note that our Talent Attraction Team reviews applications and CVs submitted in English.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: 🚀 Hizir Paket Ailesine Full Stack Engineer Arıyoruz! Lokasyon: Rize Merkez Çalışma Şekli: Tam Zamanlı Pozisyon: Full Stack Engineer 🧩 Hizir Paket Kimdir? Hizir Paket, restoranlar ve marketler için dijital sipariş altyapısı sağlayan, büyümesini hızla sürdüren bir teknoloji girişimidir. Kendi markamızla ya da işletmelere özel white label çözümlerle, yerel işletmelerin dijitalleşmesini sağlıyoruz. Misyonumuz: Her mahallede, her sokakta "bir tıkla" sipariş deneyimini erişilebilir ve hızlı hale getirmek. Artık markamızı ve sunduğumuz çözümleri daha da etkili anlatabilecek, yaratıcı bir Full Stack Engineer arıyoruz! 🙌 Aradığımız özellikler, seni bekleyen deneyin Next.js, Node.js ve TypeScript, Rest API, tRPC ile uçtan uca ürün geliştirme yetkinliği Gerçek zamanlı sistemler (WebSocket), yüksek trafikli API yapıları ve ölçeklenebilir backend mimarileri üzerinde çalışma fırsatı MongoDB, MySQL ve MSSQL ile farklı veri yapıları ve performans optimizasyonu deneyimi Sipariş yönetimi, kurye atama, rota optimizasyonu gibi gerçek dünya problemlerine doğrudan etki eden sistemler geliştirme Ürünün teknik kararlarında söz sahibi olabileceğin, inisiyatif alabileceğin bir mühendislik kültürü Hızlı iterasyon, sürekli geliştirme ve canlı sistemler üzerinde çalışma deneyimi Doğrudan ürün odaklı çalışma: yazdığın kodun anında sahada karşılık bulması Sürekli gelişimi destekleyen, teknik olarak kendini ileri taşıyabileceğin bir ortam 🙌 Anahtar kelimeler: Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), MongoDB, MySQL, MSSQL, WebSocket, REST API, Microservice mimarisi, Event-driven architecture, Redis, Queue sistemleri (RabbitMQ, Kafka), Docker, Git, CI/CD süreçleri, Linux server yönetimi, Nginx, API güvenliği (JWT, OAuth), Performans optimizasyonu, Logging & monitoring (PM2, Grafana vb.) 🙌 Seni Neler Bekliyor? Genç ve dinamik bir startup kültürü Yaratıcılığını gösterebileceğin özgür bir ortam Gerçek etki yaratabileceğin projelerde aktif rol Eğitim desteği İşinin çıktılarının binlerce kullanıcıya ulaşması

title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: About Us PRIVON is a closed-membership platform that connects a curated group of members with the city’s most exclusive venues — fine dining restaurants, boutique hotels, and premium lifestyle spaces. Access is invite-only. The experience is designed to feel nothing like a typical app. We’re at an early but serious stage, moving fast and building real infrastructure. How It Works You start on a contract basis. The first 2 months are a mutual evaluation period. If it’s a fit on both sides, you move to full-time with a competitive salary and access to our ESOP (employee stock option plan). Joining early means you share in what we’re building. What You’ll Work On - Developing and scaling our existing NestJS / Fastify / MongoDB backend - Building a full third-party reservation API integration end-to-end — webhook handling, real-time reservation flow, notification architecture - UI/UX revisions across mobile app, admin panel, and website — this is a frontend-heavy role and visual quality matters - Maintaining and extending our RevenueCat subscription infrastructure - MongoDB schema optimization and query performance improvements - Managing media storage workflows on Minio (S3-compatible) - Strengthening existing security layers (JWT, Helmet, CORS, HSTS) - Expanding Sentry error tracking to backend - Using AI coding tools as a core part of your daily workflow What We’re Looking For 3+ years of full-stack development experience Strong NestJS or Node.js backend experience React and/or React Native — with a strong eye for UI detail and polish Confident with REST API design and third-party integrations MongoDB, NoSQL database management Actively uses AI development tools — this is a requirement, not a bonus Has worked in a startup environment and can handle ambiguity without hand-holding Nice to Have Experience with payment integrations (RevenueCat, Stripe, or similar) Security-focused development (OWASP, rate limiting, input validation) Figma-to-production workflow experience CI/CD pipeline setup and management On AI Tools We expect you to use AI coding tools as part of your core workflow — especially on the frontend side. A few examples of what we mean: - **v0 by Vercel** — for rapidly generating and iterating on UI components - **Claude Code / Gemini-Stitch** — for codebase-level reasoning, refactoring, and feature implementation - **Figma AI + Builder.io** — for design-to-code workflows - **Framer** — for fast, high-quality web UI prototyping If you’re already building this way, we’ll move fast together. What We Offer - Contract start → Full-time within 2 months - ESOP — real equity in what you’re building - Competitive salary based on experience - Actual technical ownership — decisions are made with you, not around you - AI-first work culture - Hybrid, Istanbul-based
